name: Chocolate Pots De Creme
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop the German cooking chocolate.
2. In a small nonmetal bowl, stir together light cream, chopped chocolate, sugar and salt.
3. Cook on 100% power for about 1½ minutes or until the chocolate is melted, stirring every 30 seconds.
4. Stir in about half of the hot mixture into the beaten egg yolks.
5. Return all to the bowl and mix well.
6. Cook on 50% power for 2 to 3 minutes or until thickened, stirring every 30 seconds.
7. Stir in vanilla. Pour into 2 pot de creme cups or 6-ounce custard cups.
8. Cover and chill for several hours or until firm. Garnish with whipped cream, if desired.
